agent_table.name: QA Director

agent_table.name: Testing Agent

agent_table.last_report: test-summary.md + recommendation.md (244/244 tests, typecheck clean, claim BLOCKED)
agent_table.recommendation: Re-run after real wallet test; do not bypass

agent_table.name: Transaction Watcher
agent_table.role: Monitor claims, purchases, transfers, wallet/treasury events
agent_table.recommendation: Execute with live wallet; produce real (not demo) reports before any funds work

agent_table.name: Economy Observer
agent_table.role: Monitor balances, pending, duplicates, treasury, ownership
agent_table.recommendation: Activate immediately; tie to Transaction Watcher outputs

agent_table.name: Runtime Guardian
agent_table.role: Monitor API/WS failures, memory, HMR, ports, crashes
agent_table.recommendation: Produce live reports; integrate with Mission Control

agent_table.name: Release Manager
agent_table.role: Manage releases, approve merge candidates, track blockers
agent_table.last_report: Via PR Command and Merge Gate (HOLD)
agent_table.recommendation: Enforce parked branches strictly

agent_table.name: PR Command Watcher
agent_table.role: Monitor branches, PRs, CI, commits, next actions
agent_table.recommendation: Activate for real-time on parked PRs

agent_table.name: Branch Traffic Controller
agent_table.role: Monitor moved refs, force pushes, contamination, multiple agents, stale branches
agent_table.recommendation: Confirm no work on frozen; recommend FREEZE for any new issues

agent_table.name: Security Officer
agent_table.role: Run security-pass, secret scanning, auth verification, permissions
agent_table.recommendation: Activate and produce full reports before any funds-path advance

agent_table.name: Algo Auditor
agent_table.role: Audit claim paths, wallet flows, treasury, blockchain queues, duplicate risks
agent_table.recommendation: Must run before TestNet or merge on claim-related work

agent_table.name: Merge Gate Agent
agent_table.role: Determine if PR can merge (tests, security, audit, no conflicts, one-open-PR, human approval)
agent_table.recommendation: Enforce all checkboxes; no auto-approval

agent_table.name: Desktop Readiness Agent
agent_table.role: Check navigation, routes, menus, assets, responsiveness, console
agent_table.recommendation: Activate; tie to Armory in parked branch

agent_table.name: TestNet Launch Commander
agent_table.role: Determine TestNet/launch readiness (wallet tests, security, runtime, branch clean, merge gate, human)
agent_table.recommendation: Full checklist only after wallet + security + audit

agent_table.name: Chief Memory Officer
agent_table.role: L0-L5 memory layers, institutional knowledge
agent_table.last_report: None (L0-L5 populated ad-hoc in Mission Control dashboard)
agent_table.recommendation: Activate urgently; institutional memory incomplete

agent_table.name: Mission Control AI
agent_table.role: CEO Command Center, monitor all, generate dashboards, voice
agent_table.current_assignment: Prepared dashboard on parked branch; holding per orders
agent_table.recommendation: Open PR first as authorized; continue observation only

permission_audit.who_can_code: Senior Backend/Frontend/Blockchain/Infrastructure Engineers (on approved branches only). Must produce reports/handoffs.
permission_audit.who_is_report_only: QA Director, Testing Agent, Transaction Watcher, Economy Observer, Runtime Guardian, Release Manager, PR Command Watcher, Branch Traffic Controller, Security Officer, Algo Auditor, Merge Gate Agent, Desktop Readiness Agent, TestNet Launch Commander, Chief Memory Officer, Mission Control AI, Chief of Staff. These must never code or merge.
permission_audit.who_can_open_prs: Report-only agents can prepare handoff but per standing orders, no new PRs until PR #30 resolves (unless Dominick overrides). Engineering can propose but not open without approval.
permission_audit.who_must_never_merge: All agents except CEO (Dominick). Explicit in all manuals. No agent has merge permission.

critical_findings.p0: Security Officer and Algo Auditor completely MISSING. No security-pass or algo-auditor reports despite funds-path work (armory-claim) in HOLD. This violates safety gates for TestNet.
critical_findings.p1: Chief Memory Officer OFFLINE; L0-L5 only ad-hoc in Mission Control. No persistent institutional memory.
critical_findings.p2: Multiple agents (esp. Engineering + Testing) have touched or reported on parked/frozen branches without clear stop conditions in some cases. Transaction Watcher produced only demo (not real) outputs.

missing_or_weak_agents.need_activation: Chief Memory Officer (critical for L3+), Economy Observer, Runtime Guardian (live), Desktop Readiness Agent, PR Command Watcher (active), Security Officer, Algo Auditor, TestNet Launch Commander (full), Chief of Staff.
missing_or_weak_agents.need_clearer_rules: Transaction Watcher must produce real (not demo) reports before any funds work. All report-only agents need explicit 'last report' timestamps and 'stop if no human approval' rules. No dedicated agent for notifications or full dashboard updates (Mission Control is covering but overloaded).

branch_pr_discipline.one_open_pr_rule: Compliant in current standing orders (PR #30 active lane; no new PRs opened). feat/mission-control-dashboard and fix/armory-claim-ui-clean are parked, not opened.
branch_pr_discipline.frozen_branch: Confirmed - local/game-online-fixes (contaminated; untouched in this audit cycle). Many historical claude/ remotes exist but not active.
branch_pr_discipline.violations: No violations observed in this audit; orders respected.

top_3_actions_for_dominick: Activate and task Security Officer + Algo Auditor immediately (P0 for any funds-path progress).
Open the Mission Control dashboard PR (feat/mission-control-dashboard) first, as it is read-only and will provide visibility into all other agents/reports.
Assign Chief Memory Officer to capture L2-L5 from current manuals and history before further work.
